policy: Premium services can add mentoring, teacher operations and post-exam career practice, but cannot lock required exam learning.

checks.label: Exam-critical learning remains unlocked
checks.detail: Pricing must not block lessons, concepts, mock exams, explanations or local progress evidence.

checks.label: Post-exam packages are defined
checks.detail: Packaging must define core learning and post-exam service layers.

checks.label: Price points are not fabricated
checks.detail: Pricing data must remain unknown/unavailable until real validation exists.

checks.label: Charging is gated by readiness and metrics
checks.detail: Paid packaging must wait for exam readiness, tab matrix, command center and metrics gates.

checks.label: Pricing packaging gate is wired
checks.detail: package.json must expose summary/write/strict pricing packaging commands.
